name: claude-context-hub
description: A shared MCP server that bridges Claude.ai and Claude Code — your personal AI context hub deployed on Cloudflare Workers for free.

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute context-hub-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute context-hub-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_self_evolving.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute context-hub-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute context-hub-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_self_evolving.sql
